metadata.title: ComputeNord Datacenter — Affordable Rack Space for Homelabs
metadata.description: Colocation in Molfsee, Schleswig-Holstein. Configure rack units and power with transparent net pricing.

construction.bannerDetail: The Molfsee datacenter is not operational yet. Feel free to explore pricing and configurations. Bookings open once construction is complete.
construction.configuratorBody: Rack availability and prices shown here are planning figures. We cannot accept bookings until the site is ready.
construction.contactHint: Contact is for interest only while the facility is under construction.

footer.tagline: Affordable colocation in Molfsee — run by people who know where the backup lives.

provider.title: Service provider
provider.body: Datacenter Molfsee · Rendsburger Landstraße 142 · 24113 Molfsee · Germany

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: Despite careful control, we assume no liability for the content of external links. The operators of the linked pages are solely responsible for their content.

hero.lede: We run a modern data center just south of Kiel. No enterprise markup, no sales theatre. Just power, cooling, bandwidth, and a 47U rack with your name on it.

facility.title: Small enough that we know your name.
facility.lede: One room with 11 racks, honest engineering. We're not Northern Germany's biggest data center — we're the one that picks up the phone.

power.note: Redundant supply, UPS-buffered, 36 hours of diesel at full load.

cooling.note: 22 °C supply, free cooling 8 months a year — thanks, Schleswig-Holstein.

network.note: 10 Gbit/s uplinks, BGP-capable, DE-CIX Hamburg via dark fibre.

access.note: Keycard, mantrap, video recording. Remote hands on request.

pricing.title: Three numbers. That's it.
pricing.lede: No setup fees, no hidden line items. You pay for rack units and power — all prices net.

perU.note: Ideal for a single server, NAS, or firewall.

half.note: Enough for your own small cluster.

full.note: Your own PDU, your own key.

power.label: Power
power.note: Set your kW requirement in the configurator

bandwidth.label: Bandwidth
bandwidth.note: 100 Mbit/s flat, higher tiers on request

pricing.footnote: All rack prices net per month · {perU} €/U · {half} € half rack ({halfU}U) · {full} € full rack ({fullU}U)

location.title: Molfsee, ten minutes south of Kiel.
location.lede: Right off the A215. 75 minutes from Hamburg, ferry-distance from Copenhagen. We unlock the door, you slide your gear in.

cta.title: Ready to rack it up?
cta.lede: Configure your space in two minutes. Transparent net pricing, live rack preview.

configure.title: Rack & Power Configurator
configure.subtitle: Use the sliders to configure your required rack units and power.

sliders.title: Configuration
sliders.hint: Set rack units and power requirements
sliders.powerFeedsHint: Min. {min} required for max power · {free} feed included · each feed provides {kw} kW · additional feeds {price} € / month

rack.title: Rack Layout
rack.fillBeforeAdd: Fill every existing rack to {units}U before adding another.
rack.addDisabledHint: All racks must be full ({units}U) before adding another.
rack.lockedHint: Fill all previous racks to {units}U to configure this rack.
rack.schematicCentered: 3D preview — colocation at U{start}–U{end} (centered in rack)

overview.title: Total configuration
overview.subtitle: {count, plural, one {# rack configured} other {# racks configured}}

email.hint: This will take you to a contact form with your current configuration.

meta.title: Contact — Rack configuration
meta.description: Send us your details and your selected rack configuration.

contact.title: Send your configuration
contact.subtitle: Fill in your details and we’ll generate a ready-to-send email including your selected rack and power setup.

missingConfig.title: No configuration attached
missingConfig.body: Please go back to the configurator and click “Contact us” so we can include your selection.

summary.title: Configuration summary
summary.hint: Read-only preview of what you configured.

form.title: Your details
form.hint: Required fields are marked by validation.
form.name: Name

email.subject: Rack configuration inquiry ({count, plural, one {# rack} other {# racks}})

success.title: Ready to send
success.body: Copy the email text or open your mail app.
success.bodyServer: Sent successfully. You can still copy the email text or open your mail app.

error.title: Couldn’t send automatically
error.body: You can still copy the email text or open your mail app as a fallback.
